title: Anari No. 1
desc: Raja and Sapna abduct a rich tycoon who is Raja's lookalike and hold him for ransom.

title: Anari No. 1
desc: Raja, a waiter, and his girlfriend, Sapna, hatch a plan to kidnap Rahul, a rich man who is Raja's lookalike. But things go awry when Raja gets trapped in his own plan.

title: Anari No. 1
desc: Raja, a waiter, and his girlfriend, Sapna, hatch a plan to kidnap Rahul, a rich man who is Raja's lookalike. But things go awry when Raja gets trapped in his own plan.

title: Silsila Hai Pyar Ka
desc: Vanshika lands a job caring for a wealthy man's son, and through her patience and kindness, she helps him transform from a spoiled brat into a more considerate young man.

title: Silsila Hai Pyar Ka
desc: Vanshika, a simple girl, is hired by a rich man to take care of his bratty, wayward son.

title: Kishen Kanhaiya
desc: One mansion-raised, one street-smart-Kishen and Kanhaiya reunite after years apart. The twist? They're twins! And now, it's double trouble for the villains trying to tear their world apart.

title: Kishen Kanhaiya
desc: Estranged twins, Kishen and Kanhaiya reunite to seek revenge and end the injustice.

title: Ram Lakhan
desc: Two brothers with differing outlooks set out to punish those who killed their father.

title: Ram Lakhan
desc: Two brothers split because of differing beliefs, yet fate brings them back together as they eventually rescue and support each other through unfolding events.

title: Janta Ki Adalat
desc: DSP Jyoti attempts to thwart a corrupt minister's plans of becoming the chief minister.

title: Janta Ki Adalat
desc: DSP Jyoti arrests Shankar after he threatens a minister. She learns about the minister's crimes and decides to thwart his plans of becoming a CM.

title: Nadiya Ke Paar
desc: Chandan and Gunja love each other, but their families ask her to marry Chandan's brother.

title: Muqaddar Ka Badshah
desc: Naresh,works hard to earn money so that his sister can marry the man she loves. The marriage does not take place.

title: Muqaddar Ka Badshah
desc: A union leader is falsely accused of several crimes because of his fight for workers rights.

title: Police Aur Mujrim
desc: A gangster is out for blood after his henchmen get locked up by the police. Fueled by vengeance, he's determined to make them pay for their betrayal.

title: Lakshya
desc: Karan, an aimless young man, joins the Indian Army to make his girlfriend proud.

title: Lakshya
desc: Karan, a free spirit, makes a snap decision to join the army. As he navigates the tough challenges ahead, he strives to prove his worth and find his place.

title: Dastak
desc: A mentally unstable man develops an obsession with the Indian Miss Universe and starts chasing her.

title: Baazigar
desc: A cold-blooded man with a vendetta against a businessman decides to destroy his family.

title: Aarzoo
desc: After her fiance Vijay's death, Pooja marries Amar and moves on but Vijay returns.

title: Mere Sajna Saath Nibhana
desc: Kanhaiya falls in love with a woman, but icannot marry her due to her father's objection.

title: Andha Kanoon
desc: Two siblings, Vijay and Durga, choose contrasting paths to avenge their parents' death.

title: Gopi Kishan
desc: Kishan learns about a policeman who looks like him and decides to use his identity.

title: Military Raaj
desc: Major Anand is reassigned to a camp for unruly cadets amid rising chaos.

title: Eena Meena Deeka
desc: Deeka, newly released from prison, unexpectedly finds herself in the middle of a bank heist led by the clever Eena. Get ready for a wild ride of twists!

title: Khiladi
desc: Raj, Neelam, and Boney fake Sheetal's kidnapping as a prank, but things go horribly wrong when she is actually murdered. Now, all clues point to them as the prime suspects in the crime.

title: Sanam
desc: Gaurav, unloved by his family, joins the army after Narendra's death. He hopes to honor his brother's memory and finally win the respect of his distant father.
